zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton於1500年12月出生在英國爾文寧頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire25歲，母親Catherine Grosvenor23歲。她於1519年與Sir Piers Peter Warburton在英國英格蘭爾阿爾 霍爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年7月28日在英國英格蘭爾阿斯頓-比-布德沃斯享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾阿爾 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton于1500年12月出生在英国爾文寧頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire25岁，母亲Catherine Grosvenor23岁。她于1519年与Sir Piers Peter Warburton在英国英格兰爾阿爾 霍爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年7月28日在英国英格兰爾阿斯頓-比-布德沃斯享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾阿爾 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Winnington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Winnington (Cheshire, Staffs). (ii)  see  Wennington  .

variants.name: Wennington
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Wennington (Hunts, Essex). (ii)  see  Winnington  .

nameMeanings.name: Antoinette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Antoine  , which has become popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton was born in December 1500, in Winnington, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire, was 25 and her mother, Catherine Grosvenor, was 23. She married Sir Piers Peter Warburton in 1519, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 July 1559, in Aston-by-Budworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton est née en décembre 1500, à Winnington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Catherine Grosvenor, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Piers Peter Warburton en 1519, à Arley Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 juillet 1559, à Aston-by-Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Arley Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton im Dezember 1500 in Winnington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire 25 und ihre Mutter Catherine Grosvenor 23. Sie hat 1519 in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Piers Peter Warburton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Juli 1559 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Aston-by-Budworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburtonが1500年12月にイギリスチェシュアイアウィニントンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshireは25歳，母Catherine Grosvenorは23歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルリー ハルでSir Piers Peter Warburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年7月28日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアストン-ブイ-ブドウオルスで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルリー ハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton(이)가 1500년 12월 영국 체실르 윈잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Grosvenor(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알리 홀에서 Sir Piers Peter Warburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 7월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애스토-비-버드워스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알리 홀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton nasceu em dezembro de 1500, em Winnington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Grosvenor, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Piers Peter Warburton em 1519, em Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de julho de 1559, em Aston-by-Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton родилась декабрь 1500 г. в местности виннингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Grosvenor, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Piers Peter Warburton в 1519 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 июля 1559 г. в местности астон-би-будворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Piers Peter Warburton en 1519, en Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de julio de 1559, en Aston-by-Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
